name: Stay Abed Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Cubed steak meat (or a roast)
1 Bay leaf (be sure to remove after cooking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a casserole dish with a tight fitting lid.
2. Bake at 275°F for 5 hours.
3. Add any leftover chicken, celery, or other vegetables before serving.
